steps.title: Identify the logical relationship
steps.content: The passage describes how the hardingfele produces sound, then classifies it based on that mechanism. This is a cause-to-consequence structure.

steps.title: Select the consequence transition
steps.content: Thus is the consequence transition—it introduces what follows as a logical result of what preceded it. The other choices indicate contrast, addition, or parallel comparison, which don't fit here. That matches choice C — C is correct.
